title: Seven Zero Meow Team's Zombie apocalypse
description: Players can explore clans not found in Minecraft, but also full of danger.
body:
So do you like to play zombie apocalypse games? What happens when you try to survive in a crowd of mutated zombies? The longer you live, the stronger they become! So this Modpack is designed for that kind of survival experience.

Players can explore clans that are not present in Minecraft, but are also fraught with danger. The integration pack generates not only original mc monsters, but also mutant and mutated monsters. Players need to survive in this dangerous, chaotic world. Having a full set of gear will give you a different boost, the better first person is to let you experience a more realistic perspective, press F6 to switch the first person perspective.

Features:
- Blood moons happen every night.
- Survive hordes of zombies and their zombie variants.
- Add new guns, weapons, tools to make the survival experience better.


Modpack is created specifically for custom map, can be in love star temple seven meow method: https://afdian.net/a/StarsevenMeow

You can follow my YouTube channel，YouTube channel address：https://www.youtube.com/@startsevenmeow

You can follow my twitch channel，twitch channel address：https://www.twitch.tv/startsevenmeow

My twitter address：https://twitter.com/xingchenqimiao

join our discord，discorda ddress：https://discord.gg/NPXgyrMg
Remark：Please download TZP_1.20.1_2.7.zip yourself，Enhanced Boss Bars_2.zip，resourcepacks。
